services_preview.title: Our Services
services_preview.intro: Our business model is centered on interpretation, document translation, and culturally responsive communication support—so multilingual communities get accurate, respectful language access.

items.title: Document Translation
items.description: From certified official documents to everyday written communication: letters, forms, notices, outreach materials, flyers, and program documents—translated with linguistic and cultural clarity.

items.title: Interpretation
items.description: On-site and remote interpreting for appointments, meetings, intakes, school conferences, community events, and case management. Phone and video interpreting is available 24/7 at $1.99 per minute; mileage may apply for in-person visits.

items.title: Cultural & community support
items.description: Culturally informed language support so schools, nonprofits, faith communities, and service providers can reach immigrant, refugee, African, and multilingual audiences with confidence.

why_choose.title: Why Choose NAT Interpretation
why_choose.intro: We're committed to excellence in every interaction. Here's what sets us apart from the rest.

features.title: Confidentiality
features.description: Your documents and conversations are handled with the utmost privacy and security. We maintain strict confidentiality protocols.

features.title: Accuracy
features.description: Our certified professionals ensure precise translations and interpretations, maintaining the original meaning and context.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.description: We understand urgency. Rush services available for time-sensitive documents and last-minute interpretation needs.

features.title: Trusted Expertise
features.description: Experienced interpreters and translators for healthcare, schools, courts, conferences, community settings, and official documents—with a focus on accuracy and respect for every participant.

cta.title: Need an Interpreter Fast?
cta.intro: Phone and virtual interpretation is available 24/7. Call now to get connected, or request a quote for scheduled work.

specialist.title: Meet Aminata
specialist.description: With extensive expertise in interpretation and translation, Aminata brings deep cultural sensitivity to every assignment. She is a trusted partner for schools, healthcare teams, community and faith-based groups, social services, legal settings, and families—helping people connect across African languages and many other language pairs throughout Maine and beyond.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.intro: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what professionals across Maine and beyond have to say about working with us.

items.quote: NAT Interpretation provided exceptional service for our medical practice. Their interpreters are professional, culturally sensitive, and always punctual. Our patients feel comfortable and understood.
items.name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: We needed urgent translation of academic transcripts for a student visa application. NAT delivered accurate, certified translations within 48 hours. Highly recommend their document services.
items.name: James Anderson

items.quote: The court interpreter provided by NAT was excellent. Professional, neutral, and accurate throughout the entire proceeding. The legal team was impressed with the quality of service.
items.name: Attorney Lisa Chen

hero.title: Professional Interpretation & Translation Services
hero.lead: Accurate, respectful language access for multilingual communities—in Maine and remotely, whenever you need it.

service_areas.title: Service Areas
service_areas.intro: Whether you're in Bangor or across the country, we're here to help. We serve clients both locally and remotely.

items.title: Bangor, Maine & nearby
items.description: In-person interpretation and related language support throughout the Bangor area and surrounding communities. Mileage may apply depending on location; ask when you book.

items.title: Remote & Online
items.description: Video and phone interpretation services available nationwide and internationally. Document translation services can be completed remotely with secure digital delivery.

seo.description: NAT Interpretation & Translation Services, LLC — Interpretation, document translation, and culturally responsive support for schools, healthcare, community organizations, faith communities, social services, legal offices, and families. Bambara, Wolof, Arabic, Spanish, and many other languages. Maine-based; remote services available.
seo.keywords: interpretation services, African languages interpreter, Maine translation, school interpreter, medical interpretation, community interpretation, Islamic center interpreter, document translation, Bangor Maine
seo.og_description: Interpretation, document translation, and culturally responsive communication for multilingual communities—schools, healthcare, community and faith organizations, social services, legal offices, and families.
seo.twitter_description: Interpretation, document translation, and culturally responsive communication for multilingual communities across African and world languages.
seo.page_title: NAT Interpretation & Translation Services, LLC | Professional Language Services

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.intro: Getting professional language services is simple and straightforward. We've streamlined our process to make it easy for you.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.description: Contact us with your service needs, language pair, and preferred date. We'll respond within 24 hours with a detailed quote.

steps.title: We Match You
steps.description: Our team matches you with a certified interpreter or translator who specializes in your field and language pair.

steps.title: Receive Service
steps.description: Get accurate, professional interpretation or translation services delivered on time, every time.

who_we_serve.audiences_footnote: On-site and remote sessions for appointments, meetings, intakes, school conferences, community events, and case management.
who_we_serve.title: Who We Serve
who_we_serve.intro_1: NAT Interpretation & Translation Services centers on interpretation, document translation, and culturally responsive communication for multilingual communities—including immigrant, refugee, African diaspora, and other multilingual populations.
who_we_serve.cultural_p1: Culturally informed language support helps your organization communicate with clarity and respect—whether that is spoken interpretation, written materials, or outreach that lands the right way in the community.
who_we_serve.intro_2: We help schools, healthcare providers, community organizations, churches, Islamic centers, social workers, legal offices, and families communicate clearly across African languages and many others worldwide.
who_we_serve.cultural_p2: We work across a wide range of African languages and world languages. See the full list on our Services page.
